text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon and I are chatting in<n>the hallway
when Rice Shower runs<n>over to us.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Have you decided on a costume for<n>the party,
Bourbon? Creek told me<n>about your search...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The situation has not changed. I'm<n>making an
effort to search in all<n>manner of places, but I
cannot locate<n>anything to base a costume on.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, well... you've really given this a<n>lot of
thought, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, I cannot find anything...<n>All I do is
race, so maybe I really am<n>boring.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's not true at all! I mean, you're...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, if you haven't decided yet, what<n>about
going as a ghost?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A ghost?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah. I bet you could put a costume<n>together
really easily, and it won't<n>matter what you look
like underneath.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to dress up as a vampire,<n>so you could
be my ghost friend who<n>lives with me in my
mansion!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see... Even if I dress as a ghost, it'll<n>still be
"me" underneath. Indeed, my<n>facial expression
would be irrelevant.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Backstory saved to memory. I will go<n>as a
"vampire's ghost friend."

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's great! Okay, let's go<n>shopping right
away!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this material's cute... But I think<n>plain
would probably be better for a<n>ghost.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I surmise that ghosts are typically<n>white.
However, I am uncertain<n>whether that also
applies to<n>costumes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that might work! Yeah, let's do<n>that! Which
one do you like more,<n>Bourbon? This flower or
this ribbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe either one would<n>present an
issue. Why don't we use<n>whichever aligns with
my vampire<n>friend's preferences?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: O-oh, okay! So I should choose, then.<n>Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Are you okay with all the bags? I<n>feel bad
you're carrying mine too...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Are you all right, Bourbon?<n>Getting tired?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Negative. I am simply wondering<n>whether my
comments and behavior<n>while shopping were
appropriate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Even though we were shopping for<n>my benefit, I
could only offer robotic<n>responses. As such—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I had fun!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You might not show your feelings on<n>your face
very much...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But you do know how to put them into<n>words
when asked, and you're<n>always honest about
them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And because you do all that, I don't<n>feel anxious
and end up overthinking<n>things.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was the one who<n>asked you to
dress up as a ghost,<n>you still gave the costume a
lot of<n>thought.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That made me so happy... Even now,<n>I'm still
over the moon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So, nope, you're not boring at all. I<n>have so much
fun when I'm with<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter one bit if your<n>expression
doesn't change. I love<n>you just the way you are.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Is that... so?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I feel... the same. Also... I cannot wait<n>to be your
ghost friend.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah... Y-yeah. Let's make some great<n>costumes!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I catch sight of a<n>ghost and a
vampire holding hands<n>and laughing. The white
sheet seems<n>to be swaying happily.
